node.whatsapp: https://api.whatsapp.com/send?text=Confira esta oferta que encontrei no site V12 Seminovos: https%3A%2F%2Fwww.v12seminovos.com.br%2Festoque%2Froyal-enfield-interceptor-650-venture-blue-gasolina-manual-2023-2611603
